privileged_info_summary: The task uses a modified version of the Global Superstore dataset (order_lines.csv) containing exactly 9,000 rows of order data. Total sales are synthetically set to exactly 8,500,000.0 and total profit to exactly 1,300,000.0. For the required bar chart of total Sales by Product Category, the exact underlying values are: Furniture = 2,893,293.32, Office Supplies = 2,131,859.01, and Technology = 3,474,847.67.
